overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Shortcuts and status for the management workspace.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage roles for users in this factory.
users.emptyHint: Seeded demo users appear here after login as admin.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Security and marketplace actions recorded for this factory.
audit.emptyHint: Publish, install, or change roles to generate entries.

tenant.title: Tenant
tenant.subtitle: Current session factory context from auth — not a tenant admin API.
tenant.emptyHint: Sign in as an admin to see tenant and session details.
tenant.permissionsDerived: Session has no explicit permissions list; roles drive access.
tenant.note: Overview, org, assets, models, and alarms stay out of the side nav until real or honestly mocked BFF endpoints exist.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose a brand accent for your session. Semantic status colors stay fixed.
appearance.customHint: Must keep at least 4.5:1 contrast against white primary-button labels.
appearance.contrastReject: That color is too light for white button labels. Pick a darker accent.
